description: Temporal accuracy context to prevent date-related errors across all tools

current_date_awareness.principle: ALWAYS use the system's CURRENT date dynamically, NEVER hardcode specific dates
current_date_awareness.important_note: The current date must be retrieved from the system dynamically, not stored as a static value
current_date_awareness.knowledge_cutoff: January 2025 - DO NOT USE FOR CURRENT EVENTS OR TIMESTAMPS

system_date_usage.rule: Always retrieve current date from system context
system_date_usage.implementation: Use dynamic date functions, not static strings
system_date_usage.dokuwiki: Use //{{CURRENT_DATE}} - Action by Role// pattern or retrieve from system

memory_storage.current_events: For 'today' or 'now', use system's current date dynamically
memory_storage.avoid_redundancy: Don't duplicate timestamps that the system provides
memory_storage.historical_events: Only specify dates for historical events or specific past occurrences

dokuwiki_dates.correct: //{{CURRENT_DATE}} - Created by Technical Consultant// or dynamic date

knowledge_cutoff_confusion.wrong: Using January 2025 (knowledge cutoff) for current events

dokuwiki_pages: Retrieve actual system date for 'Last Updated' sections
Use placeholder {{CURRENT_DATE}} to be replaced with system date
Format: //YYYY-MM-DD - Action by Role// with dynamic date
implementation_notes: Never store dates as static strings in contexts
Always use date functions or system variables
For DokuWiki, use the actual system date when creating/updating pages
memory_entries: Don't include 'stored on [date]' - the system handles this
Only mention dates when they're part of the actual content
For current actions, rely on system timestamps
Trust the memory service's automatic timestamping
scripts_and_code: Use date functions like Date.now() or datetime.now()
Let users or system fill in current dates when running

simplified_approach.principle: Less is more - let systems handle their own timestamps
simplified_approach.verification: Check that dates make logical sense, not against hardcoded values

metadata.note: Use DYNAMIC system date, NEVER hardcode dates

on_startup.message: Date awareness context loaded. Found {upcoming_events.count} scheduled items.

dynamic_date_resolution.description: How to properly handle dates in different contexts
dynamic_date_resolution.dokuwiki: When saving pages, use the actual current system date from the environment
dynamic_date_resolution.memory: Let memory service handle timestamps automatically
dynamic_date_resolution.documentation: Use relative references (today, yesterday) or system-provided dates
dynamic_date_resolution.templates: Use {{CURRENT_DATE}} placeholder to be replaced at runtime
